creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 183553
diff with new port for math/math/R-cran-sfsmisc

Useful utilities ['goodies'] from Seminar fuer Statistik ETH Zurich, quite a few related to graphics; some were ported from S-plus.

https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/sfsmisc/index.html

Required for a factorial DoE package in the works.
